# nika.sh — llms.txt
# https://llmstxt.org/

> Nika is a semantic YAML workflow engine for AI.
> AGPL-3.0-or-later. Rust. Paris. SuperNovae Studio.

## What

Nika reads `.nika.yaml` files and executes them as AI workflows.
Five verbs: exec, fetch, invoke, infer, agent.
9 providers: Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, Mistral, Cohere, Groq, DeepSeek, Ollama, local GGUF.
63 builtin tools. 34 crates. Runs on your laptop, no daemon.

## Links

- Source: https://github.com/supernovae-st/nika
- Install: https://nika.sh/install
- Docs: https://docs.nika.sh
- Errors: https://nika.sh/errors
- Schema: https://nika.sh/schema/workflow.json
- Design: https://nika.sh/design.md
- Changelog: https://nika.sh/changelog

## Status

Chrysalis (pre-v0.90 emergence). 4 of 34 crates admitted.
Building in public. Weekly dev logs on Fridays.

## License

AGPL-3.0-or-later. Full copyleft. No SaaS loophole.
